label: Profile source
description: Third-party profile or expansion story that connects multiple chapters of the biography.

label: Alliance announcement
description: Direct company announcement marking interoperability, partnership, or ecosystem validation.

label: Platform proof
description: A launch, listing, or integration that shows distribution or infrastructure relevance.

label: AI positioning
description: A source that reframes Bloombase for accelerated computing, data pipelines, or AI-era security.

label: Primary announcement
description: A dated first-party release suitable for stronger editorial treatment because it is direct and specific.

label: Founding proof
description: An early first-party release that makes the opening public company narrative more concrete than a generic founding claim.

label: Geography proof
description: A source-backed artifact that turns location and office footprint into narrative evidence instead of decorative mapping.

label: Ecosystem visibility
description: A grouped artifact for conference, platform, and alliance signals that keep the present-tense chapter grounded in dated sources.
